hunks.replace_block:
for child in node.get("children", []) or []:
        _build_layout(pane, child, panels)
    return pane


def _apply_theme(root, theme):
    theme = theme or {}
    background = theme.get("background", "#202124")
    foreground = theme.get("foreground", "#f1f3f4")
    accent = theme.get("accent", "#4f8cff")
    panel_bg = theme.get("panel_bg", "#2b2f36")
    selection = theme.get("selection", accent)
    root.configure(bg=background)
    root.option_add("*Listbox*Background", panel_bg)
    root.option_add("*Listbox*Foreground", foreground)
    root.option_add("*Listbox*selectBackground", selection)
    root.option_add("*Listbox*selectForeground", foreground)
    style = ttk.Style(root)
    if "clam" in style.theme_names():
        style.theme_use("clam")
    style.configure(".", background=panel_bg, foreground=foreground)
    style.configure("TFrame", background=panel_bg)
    style.configure("TLabel", background=panel_bg, foreground=foreground)
    style.configure("TButton", background=accent, foreground=foreground)
    style.map("TButton", background=[("active", selection)])


def run_headless(runtime):

hunks.description: Apply schema theme during UI launch
hunks.search_block:

    root.title(settings.get("app_title", "Stamped App"))

hunks.replace_block:
root = tk.Tk()
    root.title(settings.get("app_title", "Stamped App"))
    root.geometry("1100x760")
    theme = schema.get("theme", {})
    _apply_theme(root, theme)
    panels = {}

hunks.description: Style listbox and details pane from schema theme
hunks.search_block:
listbox = tk.Listbox(services_panel)
    listbox.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

    details.pack(fill="both", expand=True)
hunks.replace_block:

        services_panel,

        fg=theme.get("foreground", "#f1f3f4"),
        selectbackground=theme.get("selection", theme.get("accent", "#4f8cff")),
        selectforeground=theme.get("foreground", "#f1f3f4"),
        activestyle="none",
        relief=tk.FLAT,
        borderwidth=0,
    )

        insertbackground=theme.get("foreground", "#f1f3f4"),
        selectbackground=theme.get("selection", theme.get("accent", "#4f8cff")),
        relief=tk.FLAT,
        borderwidth=0,
    )
    details.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

hunks.description: Add action status line and status updates
hunks.replace_block:
specs = runtime.list_services()
    for spec in specs:
        listbox.insert(tk.END, spec["class_name"])
    status_var = tk.StringVar(value=f"Loaded {len(specs)} services from the stamped app.")
    ttk.Label(actions_panel, textvariable=status_var, anchor="w", justify="left", wraplength=260).pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))

    def set_status(message):
        status_var.set(message)

    def selected_spec():
        if not listbox.curselection():
            return None
        return specs[listbox.curselection()[0]]

    def show_spec():
        spec = selected_spec()
        if spec is None:
            set_status("Select a service to inspect.")
            return
        details.delete("1.0", tk.END)
        details.insert(tk.END, json.dumps(spec, indent=2))
        set_status(f"Showing metadata for {spec['class_name']}.")

    def show_health():
        details.delete("1.0", tk.END)
        details.insert(tk.END, json.dumps(runtime.health(), indent=2))
        set_status("Rendered runtime health report.")

    def mount_ui_service():
        spec = selected_spec()
        if spec is None:
            set_status("Select a UI service before mounting.")
            return
        if not spec.get("is_ui"):
            set_status(f"{spec['class_name']} is not marked as a UI service.")
            messagebox.showinfo("Mount UI", f"{spec['class_name']} is not tagged as a UI service.")
            return
        for child in mount_frame.winfo_children():
            child.destroy()
        try:
            service = runtime.get_service(spec["class_name"], config={"parent": mount_frame})
            packer = getattr(service, "pack", None)
            if callable(packer):
                service.pack(fill="both", expand=True)
                set_status(f"Mounted {spec['class_name']} into the details pane.")
            else:
                ttk.Label(mount_frame, text=f"Mounted {spec['class_name']} (no pack method)").pack(fill="both", expand=True)
                set_status(f"Mounted {spec['class_name']} without a pack() hook.")
        except Exception as exc:
            set_status(f"Mount failed for {spec['class_name']}: {exc}")
            messagebox.showerror("Mount UI", str(exc))

    ttk.Button(actions_panel, text="Describe", command=show_spec).pack(fill="x", pady=4)
    ttk.Button(actions_panel, text="Health", command=show_health).pack(fill="x", pady=4)
    ttk.Button(actions_panel, text="Mount UI Service", command=mount_ui_service).pack(fill="x", pady=4)
    ttk.Button(actions_panel, text="Quit", command=root.destroy).pack(fill="x", pady=4)
    root.mainloop()
